overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the neon-lit Jig-Jig Street district at night. The character traverses from the dense commercial ground level with holographic advertisements and adult entertainment shops, through industrial alleyways, and up to an elevated walkway overlooking the district.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon-lit commercial street with adult entertainment shops

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded neon-lit street surrounded by holographic advertisements and various pedestrians

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading SEX SHOP on building facade
blue and red neon sign for adult toy shop
traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead
large floating holographic advertisement with bright colors
holographic projection of a person in colorful outfit

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a densely packed neon-lit commercial street at ground level. Bright red and blue neon signs for adult entertainment shops line the right side, while holographic advertisements and red paper lanterns fill the overhead space. The street is moderately crowded with pedestrians walking in various directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial alleyway with peep show booths

events.description: transitioning from bright commercial strip into darker industrial alleyway
dialogue interaction option appears with woman in green jacket

agents.ego_description: walking past industrial metal railings and approaching a woman standing by the barrier

notable_agents.action: woman in green jacket standing by metal railing smoking a cigarette

entered.detail: pink neon sign reading PEEP EE on industrial building
rusted metal safety railing along the walkway
elegant cursive neon sign for Bliss establishment
illuminated storefront with mannequins visible through window

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a darker, more industrial alleyway with dimmer lighting and fewer pedestrians. A pink neon sign for PEEP EE marks the left side while metal railings line the right. The character passes a woman in a green jacket standing by the railing, with dialogue options appearing on screen.

events.description: passing the Bliss storefront with illuminated mannequin displays

agents.ego_description: walking toward a concrete stairway entrance while passing street barriers

entered.detail: metal crowd control barriers lining the street
concrete stairway leading to upper level becoming visible
illuminated poster for braindance club with silhouette figure

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the lower street level approaching a transition point. The Bliss establishment with its mannequin display remains visible on the left while concrete stairs leading upward come into view ahead. Street barriers line the path and the area becomes sparsely populated.

events.description: beginning to ascend concrete stairs to upper walkway level
reaching the top of stairs and entering the upper plaza area

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs from lower street level to the elevated walkway

entered.detail: large neon sign reading JIG-JIG STREET with arrow
open plaza area at top of stairs with various structures

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a concrete stairway transitioning from the enclosed lower street to an upper level. The JIG-JIG STREET neon sign becomes visible on the left as the camera climbs. The environment opens up to a plaza area with partial sky visibility and different lighting conditions.

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper level railing with view of the street below

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of elevated walkway
overlook view of the lower street level with neon lights
additional neon signage mounted on upper level structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated open-air walkway overlooking the neon district below. The JIG-JIG STREET sign is prominent on the left while metal railings line the right side overlooking the lower level. The perspective offers a view down to the streets traversed earlier, with various neon signs visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic, neon-drenched ground level of a commercial district up to an expansive elevated walkway. It begins amidst a dense crowd on a street lined with red and blue neon signs, holographic advertisements, and hanging paper lanterns. As the character moves forward, the environment shifts into a darker, industrial alleyway with dimmer lighting and metal railings, passing a woman in a green jacket before approaching a sparsely populated area marked by the Bliss mannequin display. The scene then transitions as the camera ascends a concrete stairway, leaving the enclosed lower street behind while the JIG-JIG STREET sign emerges on the left. Finally, the perspective opens up onto an elevated open-air plaza, where the camera looks down from a metal railing over the glowing neon district traversed earlier.
